title: AnalogMovement
description: Unlock the power of your analog keyboard in Minecraft.
body:
# AnalogMovement
Unlock the full potential of your analog keyboard in Minecraft with presision movement. AnalogMovement lets you move with more accuracy using analog, pressure-aware keys. This mod maps WASD movements to the pressure you apply on each key to allow smoother and more accurate ingame movement.

## Supported Keyboards
- Wooting 60HE
- Wooting 80HE
